data.name: GroupsRolesAreDifferent
data.value: Groups '{0}' and '{1}' have different roles

data.name: InstanceDoesNotExist
data.value: There is no BVFEE instance with name '{0}'

data.name: InternalError
data.value: Internal error.

data.name: InternalErrorManagement
data.value: Internal error ocurred, input parameters:

data.name: InterviewerDoesNotBelongToGroup
data.value: Interviewer '{0}' does not belong to group '{1}'

data.name: InterviewerDoesNotExist
data.value: There is no interviewer with name '{0}'

data.name: InterviewersGroupDoesNotExists
data.value: There is no interviewer's group with name '{0}'

data.name: InvalidArgument
data.value: Invalid argument '{0}', zero length array is not valid argument

data.name: InvalidAuthenticationKey
data.value: Invalid authentication key.

data.name: InvalidUsernameOrPassword
data.value: Invalid user name or password.

data.name: RoleDoesNotExist
data.value: There is no role {0}

data.name: RouteArgumentIsEmpty
data.value: Route agrument should not be empty

data.name: ServerDoesNotExists
data.value: There is no server for project with name '{0}'

data.name: ServerDoesNotLinks
data.value: The server with name '{0}' for project with name '{1}' on fusion instance with name '{2}' does not links.

data.name: SurveyDoesNotExist
data.value: There is no survey with name '{0}'

data.name: TemplateSurveyDoesNotExist
data.value: There is no tempplate survey with name '{0}'

data.name: ThePersonIsNotLoggedIn
data.value: The person is not logged in.

data.name: CantCreateDefaultFusionRoot
data.value: Can't create IPtBvRoot instance for default company.

data.name: CantCreateInstanceRegistrator
data.value: Can't create Fusion instance registrator.

data.name: CantCreateSpecificFusionRoot
data.value: Can't create IPtBvRoot instance for company '{0}'.

data.name: CantGetCompanyCLSID
data.value: Can't get CLSID for company '{0}'.

data.name: ConnectionObjectCreated
data.value: Connection object is created.

data.name: DistributionObjectCreated
data.value: Distribution object is created.

data.name: NoConnectionString
data.value: There is no connection string with name '{0}'.

data.name: NoConnectionStringName
data.value: Name of connection string is not set.

data.name: NoDatabaseSettings
data.value: There are no database settings.

data.name: NoIdentity
data.value: CATI Console Identity is not specified.

data.name: UnknownFusionInterviewer
data.value: Interviewer is not a valid Fusion user.

data.name: UnknownSupervisor
data.value: Supervisor is not valid.

data.name: WrongInterviewer
data.value: Wrong interviewer.

data.name: MonitoringSessionIsClosed
data.value: Monitoring session is closed or supervisor doesn't exist. Supervisor name={0}, Session Id = {1}.

data.name: WrongLiveMonitoringSessionIdentities
data.value: Wrong live monitoring session identities: Supervisor name={0}, Session Id = {1}.

data.name: StartPlaybackError
data.value: Error starting playback voice file

data.name: PauseOrResumePlaybackError
data.value: Error pausing or resuming playback voice file

data.name: StopPlaybackError
data.value: Error stopping playback voice file

data.name: ToggleInterviewerListensToPlaybackOrRespondentError
data.value: Error toggling voice source

data.name: InvalidUserNamePassword
data.value: Invalid user name or password.

data.name: PasswordExpired
data.value: User password is expired.
